opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My ankle is totally swollen and killing me, it burns like fire when I pee, and my eyes are completely bloodshot.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Over two days my right ankle swelled up, my eyes went red, and it burns to pee — I can barely walk; I'm on my own.

symptom_narrative.character: swollen painful right ankle, burning urination, gritty red eyes
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right ankle (asymmetric), both eyes, and urethra
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: about 3 weeks after a bad gut infection (Campylobacter)
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: fatigue/malaise and low-grade feverish feeling; eyes gritty without thick pus

family_history_as_reported.narrative: nothing specific that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live alone and can't stand long on the sore ankle

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes the triad clearly, in obvious discomfort

objective_data_offered.value: right ankle is swollen and warm; both eyes red and gritty without thick pus; vision is normal
